category_sources: source_facts.description says qd is a C++/Fortran-90 double-double and quad-double package; official software directory describes QD precision functionality.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is qd; official David H. Bailey software directory and official GitHub repository use the display name QD.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README identifies end-user documentation and points to docs/qd.pdf for in-depth technical documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official David H. Bailey software directory links QD to the BL-highprecision/QD GitHub repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official QD README describe double-double and quad-double arithmetic for Fortran and C++.
